title: Battle of Kuat (disambiguation)
content:
'''Battle of Kuat''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Bombing at the Kuat shipyards]]''', a bombing in which [[Gideon Hask]]'s [[Reproduction|parents]] were [[Death|killed]].
*'''[[Bombing of the Kuat shipyards]]''', a bombing of the [[Kuat shipyards]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]] following the [[Battle of Yavin]].
*[[Cylo Hijacking|'''Hijacking of the ''Executor''''']], in which [[Cylo]] attempted to steal the ''[[Executor]]'' from the [[Kuat]] [[shipyard]]s.
*'''[[Battle over Kuat]]''', in which the [[New Republic]] stole a [[Unidentified dreadnought|dreadnought]].
*'''[[Defense of Kuat]]''', in which the New Republic launched a full-scale assault on the Kuat shipyards.

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===[[Galactic War]]===
*[[Battle of Kuat (Galactic War)|'''Battle of Kuat''']]

===[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]===
*'''[[Mission to Kuat]]''', circa [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]]–[[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], undertaken by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Rahm Kota/Legends|Rahm Kota]].
*'''[[Space Battle at Kuat]]''', during the [[Fresian campaign]].
*The '''[[Bombing of the Kuat shipyards (4 ABY)|Bombing of the Kuat shipyards]]''', during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].
*[[Battle for the Eclipse|'''Battle for the ''Eclipse''''']], in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], launched by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]].
*[[Battle of Kuat (Hunt for Zsinj)|'''Battle of Kuat''']], during the [[Hunt for Zsinj]].
*'''[[Taking of Kuat]]''', during the [[post–Zsinj campaigns]].
*'''[[Undercover attack on Kuat]]''', undertaken immediately after the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] capture of Kuat.

===[[Yuuzhan Vong War]]===
*'''[[Attack on Kuat]]''', during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

===[[Second Galactic Civil War]]===
*[[Battle of Kuat (Second Galactic Civil War)|'''Battle of Kuat''']]
